=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/effectMapFlatten_preview.ts(8,3): warning TS377086: `Effect.map` + `Effect.flatten` is the same as `Effect.flatMap` that expresses the same steps more directly. effect(effectMapFlatten)


==== /.src/effectMapFlatten_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics effectMapFlatten:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
      Effect.map((n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1)),
      Effect.flatten
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377086: `Effect.map` + `Effect.flatten` is the same as `Effect.flatMap` that expresses the same steps more directly. effect(effectMapFlatten)
    )
